findings.evidence: Lines 359-362 introduce the extra assumptions and then only `letI := hreg.fiber_isPretransitive b`; `Regular.lean:59-60` defines `IsRegular p` as surjectivity plus fibre pretransitivity under only the ambient `[TopologicalSpace E]`.
findings.fix: Generalize the signature to `lemma regularSubgroupFiberOrbitQuotient_top_subsingleton (hreg : IsRegular p) : ...` and update the docstring away from “preconnected covering”.
findings.issue: `regularSubgroupFiberOrbitQuotient_top_subsingleton` assumes `[TopologicalSpace B] [PreconnectedSpace E]`, but the proof only uses `hreg.fiber_isPretransitive b`; `IsRegular` itself is defined without either assumption on `B` or connectedness of `E`.

summary: One new endpoint lemma carries unnecessary topology and connectedness assumptions; the statement should match the existing regularity API's generality.
